name: Climb Global Solutions, Inc.
summary: Climb Global Solutions, Inc. (CLMB) is a value-added IT distribution company operating through a distribution channel serving vendors and customers. The company distributes software and technology products, maintains key vendor relationships and support programs including vendor rebates and discounts, and is integrating AI capabilities within its products and internal functions. It operates in the software industry and pursues growth through acquisitions.

products.name: IT Software and Technology Products
products.description: Value-added distribution of software and technology products through vendor and customer channels, including AI capabilities integration.

partnerships.description: Vendor relationships including rebates, discounts, and support programs critical to distribution operations.
